items.title: Barça out of UCL after rally vs. Atlético falls short
items.dek: Atlético Madrid held on after an early charge by Barcelona to reach the Champions League semifinals for the first time in nearly a decade on Tuesday.
items.body: Atlético Madrid held on after an early charge by Barcelona to reach the Champions League semifinals for the first time in nearly a decade on Tuesday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Brewers' Yelich out a month with adductor strain
items.dek: Brewers outfielder/designated hitter Christian Yelich is expected to miss at least a month because of an adductor strain.
items.body: Brewers outfielder/designated hitter Christian Yelich is expected to miss at least a month because of an adductor strain.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
items.dek: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.body: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.author: IriLine Desk
